implementedDeliverables: Unicode surrogate pairs are buffered and emitted as one committed text event
Unpaired surrogate input is replaced instead of emitting invalid UTF-16
Dead-key messages produce dedicated dead-key events
Layout-change messages produce keyboard layout events
Left and right modifier flags and key locations are represented
IME start/update/end messages produce explicit composition milestone events with unsupported details marked
System-key messages are observed but not consumed by default
Raw Input reports preserve physical device identity through opaque IDs
Raw mouse buffering coalesces high-rate relative movement per physical device
Background Raw Input requires explicit acknowledgement
contractChecks: windows keyboard phase3 composition and layout
nativeInteropPolicy: Windows-specific code uses DllImport or LibraryImport only.
packagePolicy: No PackageReference entries are allowed in Broiler.Input projects.
